info.name: text-insert
info.text: We're always dancing to a changing tune.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress requires always adjusting to a changing tune.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You must stay in sync with your social group.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress means staying in sync with life's changes.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: That move was graceful, but it lacks rhythm.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress can graceful, but it can also lack rhythm.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We aren't dancing to the same beat.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress takes many people moving to the same beat.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We've still got a few steps before we get to where we want to be.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress requires carefully synched steps before we get to where we want to be.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress requires some partners to lead and others to follow.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We've danced together for a long time, but I think it's time for us to move on to something new.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We've danced together for a long time, but I think it's time for us to move on to something new.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress has multiple partners all moving in unison.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress can be a stately waltz, or it can be a frantic tango.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: These two dance partners don't seem to know how to follow the beat.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress is only possible when you know how to follow the beat.
